Tests object creation and equality comparison in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple script that demonstrates object creation and comparison in JavaScript. It creates an object `x` using the `Object` constructor with the string "abc" as its argument. The variable `b` is then assigned the value of `x`. The `assert` function checks if `x` is equal to `b`, which evaluates to true since both variables reference the same object. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing on basic object handling and equality comparison.
